name: Nufarm Limited
description: Nufarm Limited is a prominent Australian agricultural chemical company headquartered in Melbourne. Established in 1916, the company specializes in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of a wide range of crop protection products, including herbicides, insecticides, and fungicides. With a global presence, Nufarm serves farmers in over 100 countries, leveraging its innovation capabilities and extensive product portfolio to support sustainable agricultural practices. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange, the company remains dedicated to providing effective solutions that help growers improve productivity and manage the challenges of a rapidly changing global agricultural landscape.
